questions.question: Who preached the gospel in Samaria after the persecution scattered the believers?
What did Simon the sorcerer offer the apostles money for?
options: The ability to give the Holy Spirit through laying on of hands
The ability to speak in tongues
questions.answer: The ability to give the Holy Spirit through laying on of hands

questions.question: The Ethiopian eunuch was reading from the book of Psalms when Philip met him.
The Spirit said to Philip, 'Go near and join yourself to this _____.'
After Philip baptized the Ethiopian eunuch, the _____ of the Lord caught Philip away and the eunuch saw him no more.
